title: Reward Propagation Report — Shaped Reward Quality Analysis (FTD-056-ODYSSEY)

reward_shaping.philosophy: Fee-heavy wins penalized to teach fee efficiency. Low-R wins (R < 0.80) mildly penalized to discourage marginal entries. Losses pass through unchanged — real loss pain drives avoidance learning.

fee_learning_impact.fee_drag_diagnosis: HIGH — fees > 30% of gross wins (shaping penalty fires frequently)

q_signal_health.reward_signal: DEGRADED — shaped rewards persistently negative; RL learning loss avoidance
